spec.precondition: requires valid(ctx) && valid(buft) && valid(buffers) && valid(*buffers) && valid(n_buffers) && size > 0 && (first == NULL || valid(first)) && (last == NULL || valid(last)) && (first == NULL || first is a tensor from ctx) && (last == NULL || last is a tensor from ctx) && (first == NULL || last == NULL || last is reachable from first via ggml_get_next_tensor) && no integer overflow in size && no integer overflow in (*n_buffers + 1) && no integer overflow in sizeof(ggml_backend_buffer_t) * (*n_buffers + 1)
spec.postcondition: ensures (result == true ==> (*buffers is updated with new buffer && *n_buffers == old(*n_buffers) + 1 && all tensors in range [first, last) have data allocated or view initialized)) && (result == false ==> allocation or initialization failed && *buffers and *n_buffers may be modified (freed))
